chunks.en: I usually book a meeting room using our online calendar system.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい、社内のオンラインカレンダーで会議室を予約します。

chunks.en: I book a room when my team needs to talk about a project.
chunks.ja: チームでプロジェクトについて話す必要があるとき、部屋を予約します。

chunks.en: Usually four or five people from my team will join the meeting.
chunks.ja: たいてい私のチームから四、五人がその会議に参加します。

chunks.en: When the room is already taken, I look for another free room.
chunks.ja: 部屋がもう埋まっているときは、別の空いている部屋を探します。

chunks.en: Before I book, I always check the time and how many seats we need.
chunks.ja: 予約する前に、私はいつも時間と必要な席数を確認します。

chunks.en: So booking a room is easy when I plan it a little early.
chunks.ja: だから少し早めに計画すれば、部屋の予約は簡単です。

outline: Opening: how I book a room online
Point 1: when I need it and who joins
Point 2: what I do if the room is taken and what I check
Wrap-up: planning early makes it easy

modelTalk.text: I usually book a meeting room online. It's quick and easy. I open our office app and I look for a free room. Then I pick a time and I write who will join. Most of the time, I need a room in the morning. My small team joins, so about four or five people. Sometimes my boss comes too. When the room is already taken, I don't worry. I just find another free room nearby. Or I ask a friend to change times with me. Before I book, I check some small things. I check the start time and the end time. I check the size too, because we need enough chairs. I also check if there's a screen for my laptop. When everything looks good, I click the button. That's how I book a room.

chunks.en: When I need a meeting room, I usually book it through our shared calendar app.
chunks.ja: 会議室が必要なとき、私はたいてい共有カレンダーのアプリで予約します。

chunks.en: I usually need a room when my team has our weekly sprint planning together.
chunks.ja: チームで毎週のスプリント計画をするとき、私はたいてい部屋が必要になります。

chunks.en: When the room I want is already taken, I look for another free slot nearby.
chunks.ja: ほしい部屋がもう埋まっているときは、近くの空いている時間枠を探します。

chunks.en: Small things I always check are the start time and how many seats the room has.
chunks.ja: 私がいつも確認する小さなことは、開始時間と部屋の席数です。

chunks.en: So booking a room is simple once you check the time, size, and who joins.
chunks.ja: だから時間や広さ、誰が参加するかを確認すれば、部屋の予約は簡単です。

outline: Opening: how I book a meeting room
Point 1: when I need it and who joins
Point 2: what I do when it's taken and what I check
Wrap-up: booking is simple with a few checks

modelTalk.text: At work, I usually book a meeting room through our online calendar. It's quick, and I can see which rooms are free. First, I check when I need the room and how long we'll talk. Then I add the people who will join, so everyone gets a reminder. Most of the time, only my small team comes in, maybe four or five people. Sometimes the room I want is already taken, so I look for another one nearby. If nothing's free, I message my colleagues and we move the meeting a bit later. Before I confirm, I check a few small things. I make sure the time is right and the room is big enough for us. I also check if there's a screen, because we often share slides. After that, I just send the invite out.
